metadata.title: Adopt a Pony — Invest in soft mobility
metadata.description: Finance Pony's fleet and earn up to 8.5% annual returns.

simulator.graceNotice: First 12 months: interest compounded, nothing paid out

mission.title: At pony, our mission is simple: allow everyone to play a direct role in their city and beyond, in the transition away from a car centric society
mission.item1Desc: You can finance as many bikes and scooters, starting from €500.
mission.item2Desc: Pony deploys your bikes and scooters across our cities, and makes sure they are safe, in good condition, clean, and in the right place.
mission.item3Desc: Earn up to 8.5% annual interest, landing in your bank account every single month. And after 42 months, your full investment comes back home.

campaignCard.title: Spring 2026 Fleet
campaignCard.subtitle: Financing 50 bikes and scooters deployed across 5 French cities.

waitlist.title: Be the first to know!
waitlist.subtitle1: Join the waitlist and receive an email when the next adoptions round opens.
waitlist.subtitle2: Available ponies all go within minutes!

whyInvest.item1Desc: Up to 9% interest rate. Driven by the high structural profitability of shared bikes and scooters managed by pony
whyInvest.item2Desc: The investment is backed by physical bikes and scooters, engineered by pony for durability and resilience. Physical assets with their own worth.
whyInvest.item3Desc: A pony ride produces up to 10× less CO₂ than a car, meaning your investment directly helps cut emissions.
whyInvest.item4Desc: Pony is the only French player in the sector and a leading operator, with 22 cities in service. Our bikes are designed internally by our own engineering team and produced in France by the Manufacture Française du Cycle.
whyInvest.item5Desc: At the time of your investment, we allocate specific ponies to you, they become virtually yours. Receive notifications on rides and maintenance activity, and access their live GPS location anytime!

limitedRisks.item1Title: Pony bears the risk of low demand
limitedRisks.item1Desc: Even if demand and therefore revenue falls below expectations, pony will make the monthly payments as planned.
limitedRisks.item2Title: Pony bears the risk of vandalism
limitedRisks.item2Desc: Theft and vandalism remain limited. Regardless, any losses are fully absorbed by pony and never passed on to investors. These risks are accounted for in the business model.
limitedRisks.item3Desc: We operate under multi-year permits across all our cities, working hand in hand with local authorities as a trusted mobility partner. Over 95% of our permits are renewed. If not, pony redeploys the fleet to other cities.
limitedRisks.item4Desc: Pony Invest is an investment platform regulated by the AMF and operated by Pony SAS. Investments are structured as bonds issued to the public in accordance with the French Code monétaire et financier. A summary information document (DIS) has been filed with the AMF.

howWeOperate.title: Pony takes care of everything.
howWeOperate.item1Desc: The pony mechanic team makes sure the bikes and scooters are safe, sound, clean for users to rides. We use proven maintenance & quality control techniques in order to ensure maximum service level everyday.
howWeOperate.item2Desc: Our logistics team ensures batteries are charged and vehicles are available where and when users need them most. They operate using electric vans and cargo bikes to minimise environmental impact.
howWeOperate.item3Desc: Our bikes are designed internally by our own engineering team and produced in France by the Manufacture Française du Cycle.
howWeOperate.item4Desc: We are working hand in hand with local authorities as a trusted mobility partner. Over 95% of our permits are renewed.

angelPerks.title: You'll be doing a service to others, to the planet, and to yourself!
angelPerks.item1Desc: Enjoy discounted rides across all pony vehicles in every city: no more unlock fees!
angelPerks.item2Desc: The more, the merrier! Give away free rides to your friends with your angel referral promo code!
angelPerks.item3Desc: As a pony angel, you receive regular updates on the company like new city launches, product releases, and more. You become part of a true community that actively supports pony every day.
angelPerks.item4Desc: At the time of your investment, we allocate specific ponies to you, they become virtually yours. Receive notifications on rides and maintenance activity, and access their live GPS location anytime!

comparison.disclaimer: * Indicative figures based on publicly available market data. Past performance is not a guarantee of future results.

testimonials.title: Join hundreds of Pony Angels!
testimonials.subtitle: Get in touch with existing angels to learn more about the adoption scheme.

1.title: The most mobile
1.quote: I like the idea of sharing the way Pony does because it's important to (re)create links between people.

2.title: The environmental warrior
2.quote: I am a bike person & I want to keep cars out of cities. I like the way adopting ponies supports my cause.

3.title: The smart investor
3.quote: 8.5% annual return while doing something good for the planet? That's exactly what I was looking for.

4.title: The city builder
4.quote: Investing in Pony means investing in the cities I live in. It's tangible, local and it makes sense.

5.title: The daily commuter
5.quote: I use Pony every day to get to work. Now I also earn from it. Best investment I've ever made.

6.title: The fintech native
6.quote: The returns are real, the asset is real, the impact is real. This is what modern investing looks like.

7.title: The impact seeker
7.quote: I was looking for an investment that aligns with my values. Pony checks every single box.

8.title: The early adopter
8.quote: I joined at the very beginning and I've been recommending it to everyone since. It just works.

9.title: The long-term thinker
9.quote: Monthly income for 36 months and my capital back along the way. The math is simple and I love it.

10.title: The green convert
10.quote: I used to invest in stocks. Now I invest in bikes that reduce CO2. Much more satisfying.

footer.disclaimer: All investments carry risk, including the risk of capital loss. Pony Bonds is regulated by the AMF.

hero.subtitle: Finance Pony's electric fleet and earn regular monthly returns.
hero.capitalProtectedDesc: Explanatory text coming soon — will describe the guarantee provided by the Pony vehicle fleet and the protection of your investment.

simulator.totalRepaid: Total repaid at end of term

about.title: Description
about.paragraph1: This campaign finances the acquisition and deployment of new Pony electric bikes and scooters across French cities. Your investment goes directly into the fleet that riders use every day.
about.paragraph2: You finance the entire fleet, which reduces risk and simplifies your experience. For the first 12 months, interest is compounded and added to your capital. Then, every month from month 13 to month 48, you receive a fixed payment combining capital and interest directly to your bank account.
about.riskDesc: All investments carry risk, including the risk of partial or total capital loss. Past performance is not a guarantee of future results.

cta.subtitle: Join the investors financing Pony's fleet and earning up to 8.5% annual returns, paid monthly.
